item.title: Teaching a cat how to order food
item.dc:creator: Cyberball2073

item.title: AOC didn’t deck him, but he definitely deserved it.
item.description:
________ EDIT:: just got the notification - a little clarity at the onset. I didn’t anticipate this to go off like it did. I made this post to give context in a comment on another post. Someone had said that AOC hit this catcaller, which was untrue. She posted this to her IG story Wednesday evening to talk about how shitty it is that toxic masculinity is so entrenched in our social structure that the Capitol police didn’t even bat an eye when this happened. And then opened the conversation about how we all can talk about these things and stop letting shitty humans be shitty humans. ________ Posting mostly to reference in a comment, but it’s being said that AOC slapped this catcaller on the steps of the Capitol and that’s absolutely not true. This vid is screen-recorded from her IG stories and it includes the video that the schmuck was recording of himself being disgusting. Sorry for the multiple vids, imgur likes to eat the sound on long video uploads unless you chop it up. Posted to YT in full: https://youtu.be/ZdRXghO3-tc
As always, she makes a great point about the Capitol police and virulent, pervasive sexism. I’m sure anyone who has been on the receiving end of sexist harassment can absolutely empathize with the frustration she’s expressing here. I know I can. And let’s not forget how she was, very literally, in life-threatening danger on Jan. 6th. And, honestly, still is every single day. I don’t know how she handles it.
It’s fucked that the Capitol police aren’t all fired - I’m sorry - even the innocent ones, even the ones who didn’t help on Jan. 6. If you’re a ‘good cop’ - get a different job because you’re not gonna fix it from the inside. Life isn’t an action movie. ACAB.
I wish she could have decked him and laid his ass out on the stairs.
I hope that man gets hit with virulent beer shits, wearing jeans, and stuck in heavy DC traffic on a hot day with a busted AC.
IG sucks, but her mostly-candid interactions via her stories really gives you a better idea of how incredible she is as a person, as well as a politician. Her tweets are great, but her stories and Lives aren’t scripted or proofread, and she’s still SO eloquent and confident and effective.
Imgur’s good dude to bad dude ratio is getting so much better - it’s one of the reasons I’m here. More often than not, you see sexist and creepy shitheels get knocked down by other people - no matter the gender. It makes the internet a slightly less scary place for those of us in marginalized groups.
Her most recent statement on the incident.
item.dc:creator: cuddlesdotgif

item.title: Guy tried to car jack my girl friend. She got away unharmed but the car got shot up during her escape with it.

item.title: I Painted This Today!
item.description:
This is some of the process for "Joyous Surge." I hope you enjoy watching! If you’re interested, My Etsy shop: www.etsy.com/shop/HaleyGrecoArtwork My YouTube channel: https://youtube.com/channel/UCkrQEkIvh1NBqHw9jB4Y0GA My Instagram: www.instagram.com/haley.greco.artwork
Thanks for viewing my art Imgur! Love you guys.
item.dc:creator: haleygrecoartwork

item.title: A happy dog meme dump to help with your mood
item.description:
Good boy Duke
great sportsmanship ensues
tadada dam dam...
I worked with a guy like that, sweet but kinda sad
Hey guys and gals, we're still trying to support the friend that saved me from suicide earlier this year in the effort of getting his little pup healthy and happy There's an update in the campaign about the progress and it's promissing so we may not be on it much longer. If you can help them out, please do! And have a great day https://gofund.me/96113348 ---------- I am leaving for the weekend to do a waitressing gig so I won't be around to answer comments or DM's. There will be no posts as well. See you guys on monday!
item.dc:creator: thedeadredhead
